meta.professor_methodology: Define objective, find constraint, eliminate variables, find critical points
meta.description: Finding maximum and minimum values in applied problems

patterns.name: Optimization Setup
patterns.recognition_signal: Maximize, minimize, largest, smallest, best dimensions
patterns.logic: Objective function, constraint, eliminate, find critical points, verify

worked_example.title: Box with Fixed Perimeter
worked_example.problem_latex: \text{Find two positive numbers with sum 20 and maximum product}

professor_tips: Always identify objective and constraint first
Check that answer makes physical sense
Endpoints of domain may be extrema

confidence_checklist: I can use constraints to eliminate variables
I can find and classify critical points
I can solve applied optimization problems
